# TennisStatMan

> Fan-inspired professional tennis analytics for ATP and WTA tours.

TennisStatMan is a free tennis stats site with player cards, proprietary metrics, live rankings, a world map, and a full-season tournament calendar.

## Canonical URL

https://www.tennisstatman.com

## Key pages

- Home: /
- Player cards: /players
- Live rankings: /rankings
- ATP hub: /atp
- WTA hub: /wta
- PULSE form score: /stats/pulse
- Momentum Swing Index: /stats/momentum
- Skill leaderboards (Courtside): /stats/skills
- Legend comparisons: /legends
- Tournament calendar: /calendar
- World map: /map
- Race to the Finals: /race
- Weekly picks: /picks
- Pricing: /pricing

## Proprietary metrics

### PULSE (Performance Under Load & Streak Evaluation)

A 0-100 form score for every ATP and WTA player. Ingredients:
- 40% recent results (last 10 matches, weighted by recency and tournament tier)
- 25% opponent strength
- 20% pressure points (break points, tiebreaks, deciding sets)
- 15% momentum swings

Scores above 80 indicate strong form; above 90 signals a player is peaking.

### Momentum Swing Index

Tracks win-probability shifts game-by-game during a match. Flags breaks, comebacks, and turning points when the likely winner changes.

### Player skill grades

Each player receives 0-100 grades in five categories: serve, forehand, backhand, net play, and movement.

### Legend Similarity Score

Compares a current player's skill profile against all-time greats and returns a percentage match.

## Data sources

- ATP and WTA official rankings, refreshed hourly
- Curated scouting cards for top players; auto-scouted cards for the broader top 100
- 2026 tournament calendar from Grand Slams through ITF

## Pricing

- Fan tier: free forever
- Courtside: $6/month or $48/year (billing preview — not live yet)

## Contact

Not affiliated with ATP, WTA, or ITF.
